experience.title: Assistant Information Technology (IT) Director
experience.description: Led the organization towards eligibility in the eHealth Exchange Information Network. Completed detailed survey of the county's privacy, security, confidentiality, and information exchange policies. Facilitated the processing of the Entrust Subscriber Agreement. Accelerated the organizations participation in nationwide quality efforts and maturity surveys.

experience.title: IT Supervisor
experience.description: Executed the enterprise information technology strategy. Worked closely with the Health Services CIO and stakeholders to establish project and program governance. Supervised, led, coached, and mentored approximately 12 - 25 Application Support and Project Management staff.

experience.title: Senior Management Information Systems Analyst
experience.description: Developed a comprehensive map and fit-gap review and analysis of the clinical workflow and electronic medical records requirements. Led a cross-functional and multi-dimensional Lean Six Sigma process improvement team.

experience.title: Program Administrator
experience.description: Defined, managed, and owned the three year IT project and program roadmap. Initiated and led the inclusion of HIPAA guidelines, Privacy Rule, and IT Security policies to the department workflow and applications.

extra_fields.certifications: Certified Lean Six Sigma Black Belt, Certified ScrumMaster (CSM), Certified Scrum Product Owner (CSPO), Project Management Professional (PMP), Certified Professional in Health Information Management Systems (CPHIMS)
extra_fields.training: Agile Management, Advanced Project Management Program, Project Management, IT Service Management v2
